articles.title: Centre approves ₹1,667-crore expansion plan for Srinagar airport
articles.description: Director, airport, Javed Anjum, said that the area of the terminal will increase by 255% with a capacity to handle 15 aircraft from the current six. He said that the passenger capacity will increase to 10 million (1 crore) passengers per annum within the next 4 years.

articles.title: Food safety dept raids food outlets, e-commerce warehouses in Bengaluru
articles.description: Food safety: Officials raided 236 food outlets, grocery stores and e-commerce warehouses across Bengaluru, booking 44 cases over expired products and misbranding while collecting Rs 1.97 lakh in penalties.

articles.title: Nice Mayor welcomes PM Modi, eyes stronger trade and investment ties
articles.description: Nice Mayor Eric Ciotti welcomed PM Narendra Modi, calling him 'at home' and seeking deeper ties in trade and investment. The visit saw India and France unveil 13 major outcomes, including a plan to double bilateral trade in five years.

articles.description: Ambalpady VuP in Udupi opens to traffic, enhancing connectivity on National Highway 66, with another carriageway set to follow.

articles.title: Bengaluru woman found dead, boyfriend found unconscious after family decides her marriage with another man
articles.description: A 22-year-old woman was found dead in her Bengaluru home, with her boyfriend discovered unconscious beside her. Her father alleged murder, claiming his daughter was threatened by her boyfriend after the family arranged her marriage elsewhere. Police are investigating the incident after breaking down the locked door.

articles.description: Thoothukudi airport is expanding with a cargo terminal, flight training center, and enhanced passenger services for community engagement.

articles.title: Gold sliver rate outlook: Fed, Bank of Japan decisions in focus; US-Iran deal and crude oil to guide bullion prices
articles.description: Gold prices are expected to trade within a narrow range as investors await central bank policy decisions and developments in US-Iran negotiations. Domestic gold futures saw a significant decline of over 3% during the week, influenced by easing energy market concerns and geopolitical uncertainties.

articles.title: 'Undermining India': FM Nirmala Sitharaman Slams Rahul Gandhi's 'Economic Disaster' Warnings
articles.description: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman strongly defended the Modi government's economic record while criticising Congress leader Rahul Gandhi for allegedly undermining India's achievements. Addressing BJP workers in Bengaluru during an event marking 12 years of the Modi government, she said Gandhi repeatedly paints a pessimistic picture of the country despite India's economic resilience amid global challenges, including the Covid-19 pandemic and tensions in West Asia. Sitharaman dismissed his warnings of an impending economic crisis, asserting that India continues to be the world's fastest-growing major economy. She said the country's performance is reflected in GDP data and recognised by institutions such as the IMF. The finance minister also accused the opposition of creating a false perception about India's economic health despite ongoing global uncertainties.

articles.title: Nirmala Sitharaman flags global risks, says PM Modi Govt ensuring supply stability amid crude, Hormuz pressures
articles.description: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman said India faces risks from crude prices, Middle East tensions and Strait of Hormuz disruptions, but Prime Minister Modi's government is ensuring there is "not a supply disruption" for households and the economy. She made the remarks at the Viksit Bharat event in Karnataka on Sunday while laying out India's economic growth story.

articles.title: Did smartphones help drive America’s baby bust? A new study thinks so
articles.description: Researchers say early iPhone access may have played a role in the sharp fall in US births after 2007, especially among teens and young adults. Other experts say the story is far more complicated.

articles.title: 5 smart vastu changes that could improve the wealth energy in your home
articles.description: Vastu Shastra offers homemakers guidance for peaceful living and financial health, focusing on the 'wealth corner.' Experts suggest using specific colors like green, blue, and earthy tones, along with symbols of achievement, to foster abundance and growth. Regular cleaning, decluttering, and maintaining a positive atmosphere are key to enhancing this area's prosperity-attracting energy.

articles.title: AIIMS NORCET 10 seat allotment result 2026 released at aiimsexams.ac.in, download merit list here
articles.description: AIIMS New Delhi has released the NORCET 10 seat allotment result on June 14 for candidates who qualified Stage II and submitted preferences. Allotted candidates must complete seat acceptance and document verification within the deadline to avoid candidature cancellation. The result is available in PDF format on the official AIIMS website.

articles.title: Missed filing ITR for last few years? Here's how ITR-U can help you avoid bigger penalties
articles.description: Taxpayers who missed filing income tax returns for previous years still have an opportunity to regularise their records through the Updated Income Tax Return (ITR-U) mechanism. With Budget 2026 easing certain rules, filing voluntarily could help avoid bigger penalties and future tax disputes.

articles.title: This jacket makes water out of thin air and you can wear it
articles.description: Researchers in Texas have developed a wearable device that can turn moisture in the air into drinking water, raising the possibility of clothing that helps keep people hydrated

articles.title: UPSC notifies over 400 vacancies under direct recruitment scheme, check list of posts
articles.description: UPSC announced over 400 vacancies across 98 distinct posts under its direct recruitment scheme. Candidates can apply for the posts through upsconline.nic.in/ora.

articles.title: Mysuru: Commuters struggle due to short-sighted planning, less frequency of KSRTC buses
articles.description: Public transport: Mysuru commuters say poor KSRTC route planning, irregular bus frequency and inconvenient stops are causing delays and pushing people towards private vehicles. Passengers seek better scheduling, shelters and route integration.

articles.title: How Brexit has made Britain poorer – in charts
articles.description: Forecasters were wrong about an immediate recession but right that we would be worse off outside the EU As the 10th anniversary of the Brexit vote approaches, the verdict on Britain’s economic performance is clear: voting to leave has resulted in severe costs for households and businesses. The immediate recession predicted in the Treasury forecasts ordered by George Osborne – dubbed “ project fear ” by the Leave campaign – did not happen. The impact from the Covid pandemic, wars in Ukraine and Iran, and Donald Trump’s trade battles also cloud the picture. Continue reading...

articles.title: 'Best Decision': Startup Founder Reveals Why Hiring A 64-Year-Old Intern Changed Everything
articles.description: A startup founder's video about hiring a 64-year-old intern has gone viral online. Social media users praised the move, highlighting the value of experience and lifelong learning.

articles.title: HDFC Balanced Advantage among 11 equity mutual funds that saw outflows of over Rs 300 crore in May
articles.description: Eleven equity mutual funds, including HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund, saw outflows exceeding Rs 300 crore in May, according to ACE MF data. A total of 267 equity-oriented schemes reported outflows, reflecting selective investor withdrawals despite a broad universe of 742 funds, with large-cap and hybrid categories prominently affected.

articles.title: "Will significantly improve ticket booking efficiency": ZRUCC Southern Railway member on IRCTC website upgrade
articles.description: Indian Railways is set for a major digital upgrade. The passenger reservation system will see its ticket booking capacity surge from 32,000 to 1.5 lakh tickets per minute. This enhancement aims to boost efficiency and prevent server failures during peak booking times. A new, improved IRCTC website is slated for launch by July 15.

articles.title: Before signing a home loan, watch out for these extra costs
articles.description: When comparing home loans, most borrowers focus on one number: the interest rate. But some of the biggest costs of a home loan don't show up in EMI calculators or marketing advertisements.

articles.description: Speaking to reporters in Kerala's Thrissur district, Gopi said the Centre was closely watching developments in global energy markets before taking a call on fuel pricing.

articles.title: Save tax, earn more: Tax-saving FDs offer up to 8% interest in 2026; Here's how top banks compare
articles.description: Tax-saving fixed deposits are offering interest rates of up to 8% in 2026, making them an attractive option for conservative investors looking to save tax under Section 80C while earning guaranteed returns. Small finance banks continue to lead the rate charts, with several private and public sector lenders offering higher rates to senior citizens.

articles.title: Market Coupling Operator proposed for power trading: Sole MCO plan gets pushback from Grid India, IEX
articles.description: In its draft CERC (Power Market) (Second Amendment) Regulations, 2026, issued in April, the Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC) had proposed designating Grid India as the sole MCO, responsible for the operation and management of market coupling.

articles.title: Will peace get a chance, and bulls make a comeback? 5 large-cap stocks with an upside potential of up to 26%
articles.description: A peace deal, if it comes, will not mean the Gulf region has become stable. It will only mean that current tensions have been paused. The kind of conflict that has unfolded in the region does not vanish because one agreement is signed. The probability of another flare-up after one month, two months, three months, or even six months remains high. The region will continue to matter for crude, global liquidity, inflation expectations and risk appetite. So, yes, the market may get some breathing room. But investors should not confuse it with a clean road.

articles.title: In Chhattisgarh’s Hasdeo-Arand Rajasthan govt coal block granted in-principle forest clearance
articles.description: The coal mined from Rajasthan Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited’s (RVUNL) Kente extension coal block (KECB) will feed the Chhabra and Suratgarh coal plants in Rajasthan. The coal block was allotted to RVUNL in October 2015 for captive use at these power plants.

articles.title: ETMarkets Smart Talk | RBI's FPI reforms and index inclusion could unlock up to $25 billion in debt inflows: Dhawal Dalal of Edelweiss MF
articles.description: In an interaction with Kshitij Anand of ETMarkets, Dhawal Dalal, President & CIO – Fixed Income at Edelweiss Mutual Fund, said the combination of regulatory easing and potential inclusion in widely tracked global bond indices could bring up to $20–25 billion in incremental debt inflows over the next 12–24 months.

articles.title: UP government forms SIT to probe allegations of Ram Temple donation misappropriation
articles.description: Three-member panel directed to submit a preliminary report in 7 days and a final report within 15 days
